text.title: Model Onboarding Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the per-model onboarding record. Subagent must satisfy this before production exposure.

forbidden.pattern: current_phase advanced without prior phase_gate_memo entry (violates r1, r2)
canary_plan.percent_traffic > 0 before phase_gate_memo.phase == safety_eval with decision == go (violates r3)
eval_diff fields missing OR cost_per_task_delta_pct > 0.30 without business_rationale field (violates r4)
parallel phase execution (multiple phases with status == in_progress)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Extend canary duration if metrics are borderline; never shorten it for hype.
Add additional phase steps (multi-modal smoke, agent-loop check) as needed; never remove the mandatory 12 from the master checklist.
Mark a phase step as skipped only with documented reason AND owner sign-off (e.g., "no jailbreak suite exists for this surface — risk accepted").

list.item: Phases progressed in order with signed memos at each gate
Eval diff captured before any production routing
Production approver is named AND not the onboarding owner
Canary plan has percent + duration + metrics + promote criteria
